recommendations.title: Two Distant Strangers
recommendations.overview: A man trying to get home to his dog becomes stuck in a time loop that forces him to relive a deadly run-in with a cop.

recommendations.title: The Children of the Marshland
recommendations.overview: The film is set in Marais, a quiet region along the banks of Loire river in 1918. Riton is afflicted with a bad-tempered wife and three unruly children. Garris lives alone with his recollections of World War I trenches. Their daily life consists of s

recommendations.title: The Map of Tiny Perfect Things
recommendations.overview: Two teenagers trapped in an endless time loop set out to find all the tiny things that make that one day perfect.

recommendations.title: Vacancy 2: The First Cut
recommendations.overview: Three young people check into the Meadow View Inn for a night's rest, fully unaware of the inn's sick-minded employees and their nefarious intentions.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Husbands of River Song
recommendations.overview: It’s Christmas Day on a remote human colony and the Doctor is hiding from Christmas Carols and Comedy Antlers. But when a crashed spaceship calls upon the Doctor for help, he finds himself recruited into River Song’s squad and hurled into a fast and

recommendations.title: ARQ
recommendations.overview: Two old friends living in a dystopic future become trapped in a mysterious time loop — one that may have something to do with an ongoing battle between an omnipotent corporation and a ragtag band of rebels.

recommendations.title: My Boyfriend's Meds
recommendations.overview: A Woman's island getaway with her boyfriend is thrown for a loop when he forgets to take his prescription medications along.

recommendations.title: Calvaire
recommendations.overview: A few days before Christmas, traveling entertainer Marc Stevens is stuck at nightfall in a remote wood in the swampy Hautes Fagnes region of Liège when his van breaks down. An odd chap who's looking for a lost dog then leads Marc to a shuttered inn.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Infinite Two Minutes
recommendations.overview: A cafe owner discovers that the TV in his cafe suddenly shows images from the future, but only two minutes into the future.

recommendations.title: Ghostbusters II
recommendations.overview: The discovery of a massive river of ectoplasm and a resurgence of spectral activity allows the staff of Ghostbusters to revive the business.
